mapper.select: SELECT perm.id, perm.user_id, usr.username, usr.real_name, perm.provider_config_id, cfg.provider_name, perm.can_manage_provider, perm.can_use_ai, perm.can_train_skill, perm.can_publish_skill, perm.can_use_agent, perm.can_run_analysis, perm.status, perm.grant_time FROM ai_user_ai_permission perm INNER JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = perm.user_id AND usr.is_deleted = FALSE INNER JOIN ai_provider_config cfg ON cfg.id = perm.provider_config_id AND cfg.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE perm.user_id = #{userId} AND perm.status = 1 ORDER BY perm.grant_time DESC, perm.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_user_ai_permission SET can_manage_provider = #{canManageProvider}, can_use_ai = #{canUseAi}, can_train_skill = #{canTrainSkill}, can_publish_skill = #{canPublishSkill}, can_use_agent = #{canUseAgent}, can_run_analysis = #{canRunAnalysis}, status = #{status}, grant_time = #{grantTime}, grant_user = #{grantUser} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_ai_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND can_manage_provider = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_ai_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND can_train_skill = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_ai_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND can_publish_skill = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_ai_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND can_use_agent = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_ai_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND can_use_ai = TRUE
